blog.description: Read the latest news from our company

builtForConstruction.title: Built for Construction from the Ground Up
builtForConstruction.subtitle: Masar is not an accounting system with a construction add-on — it was designed from day one around the Saudi contractor's 5-stage business cycle.

1.name: Estimation
1.description: Quantity takeoff, cost analysis, and preparing technical & financial proposals.

2.name: Contracting
2.description: Signing the contract, setting payment terms, line items, and schedule.

3.name: Execution
3.description: Field reports, progress tracking, and subcontractor management.

4.name: Finance
4.description: Progress claims, invoices, payments, and cash-flow tracking.

5.name: Handover
5.description: Owner portal, final documentation, and completion certificates.

builtForConstruction.flowText: Every stage is connected — data flows automatically from estimation to handover with no double entry.

generic.1: Designed for general accounting with a project module bolted on later.
generic.2: Don't support the full contracting cycle from estimation to handover.
generic.3: Require expensive customization to fit a contractor's workflow.
generic.title: Generic Systems

masar.1: Built from the ground up around the contractor's 5-stage business cycle.
masar.2: Data flows automatically between estimation, contracting, execution, and finance.
masar.3: Ready to use out of the box — no customization or extra development needed.

dashboard.addFirstProjectDesc: Start by adding your first project and enjoy full project management from one place

tips.quantitySmart: You can calculate structural quantities automatically — foundations, columns, slabs, walls — and price them smartly from one place
tips.aiAssistant: Masar's AI assistant can answer any question about your projects or finances instantly — try asking it!
tips.ownerPortal: Create a private portal for the project owner to track progress, payments, and timeline without needing a Masar account
tips.invoiceTemplates: Design your invoice and quotation templates with drag-and-drop — add your logo, colors, and ZATCA QR code
tips.zatcaQr: Masar auto-generates ZATCA QR codes on every tax invoice — Phase 1 compliant
tips.ganttChart: Track your timeline with an interactive Gantt chart with drag-and-drop — and analyze your project's critical path
tips.subcontractors: Manage subcontracts fully — items, claims, payments, retention — all within each project
tips.dailyReports: Document daily site reports with photos and notes — weather, labor, obstacles, and progress percentage
tips.criticalPath: Masar calculates your project's critical path automatically and shows activities that affect the delivery date
tips.leadsTracking: Track potential clients from first contact to winning the project — with a visual pipeline
tips.payrollSystem: Create monthly payroll runs and add allowances and deductions per employee — then approve with one click
tips.documentVersions: Upload project documents with version tracking — and revert to any previous version anytime
tips.approvalWorkflow: Create approval requests for project documents and assign approvers — with automatic notifications
tips.cashFlow: Monitor your cash flow with detailed reports — daily, weekly, or monthly — with cumulative balance
tips.changeOrders: Record change orders on projects with their impact on value and schedule — and approve electronically
tips.buildingConfig: The building config wizard auto-calculates column and wall heights from floor elevations — no manual calculation needed
tips.mepEngine: The MEP engine calculates electrical, plumbing, and HVAC needs automatically based on areas and building type
tips.finishingCalc: Smart finishing calculator — tiles, paint, plaster, marble — calculates quantities and costs with waste percentages
tips.profitability: Per-project profitability report compares revenue to direct costs and subcontractor expenses — know your real profits
tips.quotationGen: Convert quantity study and pricing directly into a professional quotation ready to send — with one click
tips.employeeLeaves: Complete leave system — 8 Saudi default leave types with balances, requests, and approval
tips.assetTracking: Track your assets — equipment, vehicles, tools — with depreciation and insurance expiry dates
tips.bankTransfers: Transfer between your bank accounts and cash boxes directly — balances update automatically
tips.multiLanguage: Masar supports Arabic and English fully — switch languages anytime without reloading
tips.darkMode: Enable dark mode for eye comfort — Masar supports light, dark, and system modes
tips.rolePermissions: Create custom roles for your team — control who sees finance, who edits projects, who approves documents
tips.claimsWorkflow: Create interim and final claims for your projects — with detailed items and full approval workflow
tips.boqSummary: BOQ summary table shows all project materials — concrete, rebar, blocks — filtered by floor and element
tips.heightDerivation: Just enter floor elevations — Masar auto-calculates column heights, block wall heights, and neck columns
tips.teamChat: Real-time chat within each project — communicate with your team and the project owner from one place

faq.description: Do you have any questions? We have got you covered.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

1.question: Do I need technical experience?
1.answer: No. Masar is designed to be easy for anyone.

2.question: Does it fully support Arabic?
2.answer: Yes, built in Arabic from the ground up — interface, reports, and invoices.

3.question: Are invoices ZATCA compliant?
3.answer: Yes, compliant with Phase 1 e-invoicing requirements.

4.question: How many projects can I add?

5.question: Can the owner track the project?
5.answer: Yes, the Owner Portal gives them direct access to updates and reports.

6.question: Is my data secure?
6.answer: Each company's data is fully isolated with encryption and multi-level permissions.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.description: Tools designed for Saudi contractor workflows
features.label: Features

1.title: Comprehensive Dashboard
1.description: Project status, budget, and timeline — all at a glance. Monitor every project in real-time with smart alerts.

2.title: Field Execution
2.description: Daily reports, photos, issues, and progress — directly from site. Record everything in the field with ease.

sub.1: Daily reports with photos and notes

3.title: Finance & Invoicing
3.description: Expenses, claims, payments, and invoices — connected automatically. ZATCA-compliant e-invoicing built in.

4.title: Pricing & Quantity Surveying
4.description: Professional BOQs and accurate project pricing. From drawings to quotation — everything in one place.

5.title: Contractors & Contracts
5.description: Subcontracts, change orders, and payment terms — organized and tracked. Monitor subcontractor performance easily.

6.title: Owner Portal
6.description: Owners access project updates directly — no manual reports needed. Secure link without account required.

7.title: Smart Permissions
7.description: Each user sees only what's relevant — manager, engineer, accountant, supervisor. Multi-level security built in.

Hey,

ownerAccess.title: Owner Portal Access
ownerAccess.description: Create and manage access links for the project owner

ownerAccess.createDialogDescription: Create a new access link for the project owner. The link will allow access to project summary, schedule, payments, and chat.
ownerAccess.successDescription: Copy the link below and share it with the project owner.
ownerAccess.warningCopyNow: Make sure to copy this link now. You won't be able to see the full token again.
ownerAccess.revokeDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke this access link? The owner will no longer be able to use it.
ownerAccess.renewDescription: Choose the new validity period for the link.

ownerPortal.invalidLinkDescription: This access link is invalid or has been revoked.
ownerPortal.tokenExpiredDescription: Please contact the contractor for a new access link.

chat.title: Chat
chat.startConversation: Start a conversation with the project team

painPoints.title: Real challenges holding back construction companies
painPoints.label: The Problem

1.title: Scattered Tools
1.description: Managing projects via WhatsApp and scattered spreadsheets causes information loss and delayed decisions.

2.title: No Financial Visibility
2.description: No clear view of project status: ahead or behind? Profitable or losing?

3.title: Weak Field Tracking
3.description: Site reports, photos, and notes are not accurately linked to actual project progress.

4.title: Multiple Disconnected Systems
4.description: Separate software for invoicing, accounting, and projects with no real integration.

5.title: Hard to Track Performance
5.description: Monitoring actual vs. planned progress relies on inaccurate manual methods.

6.title: Systems Not Built for the Local Market
6.description: Foreign systems that don't reflect the way business works in the Saudi market.

painPoints.solution: Masar unifies financial management, execution, and site operations in one integrated platform.
